## What this changes (the look)

<!-- e.g. "Redesigns the general store with an awning + barrels" — a screenshot/GIF helps a lot. -->

## Screenshot / preview

<!-- Drag an image in, or describe how to see it (which part id / page). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Purely **visual / design** — no money, functions, claims, backend, secrets, or keys.
- [ ] Colours use **palette tokens** (no raw hex).
- [ ] `node guard.mjs` passes locally (CI runs it too).
- [ ] Honest: no fake crowds, no "safe/verified/best/endorsed" language.
- [ ] If I used the generator, `node partkit/catalog-verify.mjs` renders with **0 JS errors**.

<!-- If your change needs the backend, please open a Feature Request issue instead — SaSame builds the backend side. -->
